title: fagara torva
intro: Fagara torva, also known as the Chinese prickly ash, is a species of flowering plant in the genus Fagara, native to China. This plant has been used in traditional Chinese medicine for centuries due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Fagara torva include its ability to relieve pain, reduce fever, and improve digestion, making it a valuable remedy for various ailments. Fagara torva is typically prepared as a herbal tea or dried into a powder for use in supplements or traditional Chinese medicine formulas.
